title: Ubiquiti case for UAP nanoHD, U6 Lite a U6+, Camo Design, 1-Pack
description: nHD-cover-Camo-3 is a cover for UAP-nanoHD, U6 Lite, U6+ and *UAP-AC-LITE with Camo design. For demanding customers is available up to 6 optional skins allow the UniFi AP to blend into its surroundings Cover for UAP-AC-LITE is not officially supported by manufacturer. After testing and comparing UAP-AC-LITE and UAP-nanoHD, LITE version is 1mm lower and fits into the cover without any problem (1) cover with motive
